lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਰੇ ਸਦਾ ਸਾਚੇ ਕੀ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: anadin bhagat kare sadaa saache kee liv laae |
lines.english: Night and day, worship the True Lord with devotion and love forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਮੰਨਿਐ ਗੁਰੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabad maniai gur paaeeai vichahu aap gavaae |
lines.english: With faith in the Shabad, the Guru is found, and selfishness is eradicated from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਮਨਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੪॥੧੯॥੫੨॥
lines.translit: naam padaarath man vasiaa naanak sehaj samaae |4|19|52|
lines.english: The Treasure of the Naam abides in the mind; O Nanak, in the poise of perfect balance, merge into the Lord. ||4||19||52||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਪੁਰਖੀ ਸਤਗੁਰੁ ਨ ਸੇਵਿਓ ਸੇ ਦੁਖੀਏ ਜੁਗ ਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: jinee purakhee satagur na sevio se dukhee jug chaar |
lines.english: Those who do not serve the True Guru shall be miserable throughout the four ages.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰਿ ਹੋਦਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨ ਪਛਾਣਿਆ ਅਭਿਮਾਨਿ ਮੁਠੇ ਅਹੰਕਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: ghar hodaa purakh na pachhaaniaa abhimaan mutthe ahankaar |
lines.english: The Primal Being is within their own home, but they do not recognize Him. They are plundered by their egotistical pride and arrogance.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਨ ਸੇਵਿਓ ਸਭਿ ਕਾਜ ਸਵਾਰਣਹਾਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sachaa sabad na sevio sabh kaaj savaaranahaar |1|
lines.english: They do not serve the True Word of the Shabad, which is the solution to all of their problems. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਗੁਰੂ ਕਿਆ ਫਿਟਕਿਆ ਮੰਗਿ ਥਕੇ ਸੰਸਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: sataguroo kiaa fittakiaa mang thake sansaar |
lines.english: Cursed by the True Guru, they wander around the world begging, until they are exhausted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਮਰਨ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਰਹਰੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਭਰਪੂਰਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: janam maran dukh paraharai sabad rahiaa bharapoor |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He shall remove the pains of death and rebirth; the Word of the Shabad shall fill you to overflowing. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਸਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਵੇਖੁ ਹਦੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: man mere sadaa har vekh hadoor |
lines.english: O my mind, see the Lord ever close at hand.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਸਲਾਹਨਿ ਸੇ ਸਚੇ ਸਚਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਧਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sach salaahan se sache sachaa naam adhaar |
lines.english: Those who praise the True One are true; the True Name is their Support.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਸਾਹੁ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਮੇਟਣਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa saahu varatadaa koe na mettanahaar |
lines.english: The True King has written His Order, which no one can erase.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੀ ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਵਣੀ ਸਚੇ ਨਾਲਿ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sachee kaar kamaavanee sache naal piaar |
lines.english: They act truthfully, in love with the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਮਹਲੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਨੀ ਕੂੜਿ ਮੁਠੇ ਕੂੜਿਆਰ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: manamukh mehal na paaeinee koorr mutthe koorriaar |2|
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs do not obtain the Mansion of the Lord's Presence. The false are plundered by falsehood. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਕਰਤਾ ਜਗੁ ਮੁਆ ਗੁਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਘੋਰ ਅੰਧਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: haumai karataa jag muaa gur bin ghor andhaar |
lines.english: Engrossed in egotism, the world perishes. Without the Guru, there is utter darkness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਹਿ ਤਾ ਉਬਰਹਿ ਸਚੁ ਰਖਹਿ ਉਰ ਧਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: satagur seveh taa ubareh sach rakheh ur dhaar |
lines.english: Those who serve the True Guru are saved; they keep the True One enshrined in their hearts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹਿ ਵਿਸਾਰਿਆ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਦਾਤਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa mohi visaariaa sukhadaataa daataar |
lines.english: In emotional attachment to Maya, they have forgotten the Great Giver, the Giver of Peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿ ਮਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲਾ ਹਉਮੈ ਤਜਿ ਵਿਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: satagur sev man niramalaa haumai taj vikaar |
lines.english: Serving the True Guru, the mind becomes immaculate and pure; egotism and corruption are discarded.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਸਚਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: kirapaa te har paaeeai sach sabad veechaar |3|
lines.english: By His Grace, we find the Lord, and reflect on the True Word of the Shabad. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੰਧਾ ਧਾਵਤ ਰਹਿ ਗਏ ਲਾਗਾ ਸਾਚਿ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: dhandhaa dhaavat reh ge laagaa saach piaar |
lines.english: The pursuit of worldly affairs comes to an end, when you embrace love for the True One.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੁ ਛੋਡਿ ਜੀਵਤ ਮਰੈ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਵੀਚਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: aap chhodd jeevat marai gur kai sabad veechaar |
lines.english: So abandon your selfishness, and remain dead while yet alive. Contemplate the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਿ ਰਤੇ ਮੁਖ ਉਜਲੇ ਤਿਤੁ ਸਾਚੈ ਦਰਬਾਰਿ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: sach rate mukh ujale tith saachai darabaar |4|
lines.english: Those who are attuned to Truth-their faces are radiant in the Court of the True Lord. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਗੁਰੁ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨ ਮੰਨਿਓ ਸਬਦਿ ਨ ਲਗੋ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: satagur purakh na manio sabad na lago piaar |
lines.english: Those who do not have faith in the Primal Being, the True Guru, and who do not enshrine love for the Shabad

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸਨਾਨੁ ਦਾਨੁ ਜੇਤਾ ਕਰਹਿ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਖੁਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: eisanaan daan jetaa kareh doojai bhaae khuaar |
lines.english: they take their cleansing baths, and give to charity again and again, but they are ultimately consumed by their love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਆਪਣੀ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰੇ ਤਾ ਲਾਗੈ ਨਾਮ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: har jeeo aapanee kripaa kare taa laagai naam piaar |
lines.english: When the Dear Lord Himself grants His Grace, they are inspired to love the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਮਾਲਿ ਤੂ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਹੇਤਿ ਅਪਾਰਿ ॥੫॥੨੦॥੫੩॥
lines.translit: naanak naam samaal too gur kai het apaar |5|20|53|
lines.english: O Nanak, immerse yourself in the Naam, through the Infinite Love of the Guru. ||5||20||53||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਸੁ ਹਉ ਸੇਵੀ ਕਿਆ ਜਪੁ ਕਰੀ ਸਤਗੁਰ ਪੂਛਉ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: kis hau sevee kiaa jap karee satagur poochhau jaae |
lines.english: Whom shall I serve? What shall I chant? I will go and ask the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਹਾ ਸੇਵਾ ਚਾਕਰੀ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: ehaa sevaa chaakaree naam vasai man aae |
lines.english: By this work and service, the Naam shall come to dwell within my mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਭਾਣਾ ਮੰਨਿ ਲਈ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: satagur kaa bhaanaa man lee vichahu aap gavaae |
lines.english: I will accept the Will of the True Guru, and eradicate selfishness from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੈ ਹੀ ਤੇ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਸਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੁਹਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naamai hee te sukh paaeeai sachai sabad suhaae |1|
lines.english: Through the Naam, peace is obtained; I am adorned and embellished by the True Word of the Shabad. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਜਾਗੁ ਹਰਿ ਚੇਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: man mere anadin jaag har chet |
lines.english: O my mind, remain awake and aware night and day, and think of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਣੀ ਖੇਤੀ ਰਖਿ ਲੈ ਕੂੰਜ ਪੜੈਗੀ ਖੇਤਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aapanee khetee rakh lai koonj parraigee khet |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Protect your crops, or else the birds shall descend on your farm. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਕੀਆ ਇਛਾ ਪੂਰੀਆ ਸਬਦਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਭਰਪੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: man keea ichhaa pooreea sabad rahiaa bharapoor |
lines.english: The desires of the mind are fulfilled, when one is filled to overflowing with the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਦਾ ਮਨੁ ਰਾਤਾ ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਗਇਆ ਸਰੀਰਹੁ ਦੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: sachai sabad sadaa man raataa bhram geaa sareerahu door |
lines.english: Doubt runs far away from the bodies of those, whose minds remain forever attuned to the True Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਭਾਇ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਰਹਿ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਵੇਖੈ ਸਦਾ ਹਦੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: bhai bhaae bhagat kareh din raatee har jeeo vekhai sadaa hadoor |
lines.english: One who fears, loves, and is devoted to the Dear Lord day and night, sees Him always close at hand.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਸਾਚਾ ਗੁਣੀ ਗਹੀਰੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: niramal saahib paaeaa saachaa gunee gaheer |2|
lines.english: The Immaculate Lord and Master is found. He is True; He is the Ocean of Excellence. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਜਾਗੇ ਸੇ ਉਬਰੇ ਸੂਤੇ ਗਏ ਮੁਹਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jo jaage se ubare soote ge muhaae |
lines.english: Those who remain awake and aware are saved, while those who sleep are plundered.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਨ ਪਛਾਣਿਓ ਸੁਪਨਾ ਗਇਆ ਵਿਹਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa sabad na pachhaanio supanaa geaa vihaae |
lines.english: They do not recognize the True Word of the Shabad, and like a dream, their lives fade away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁੰਞੇ ਘਰ ਕਾ ਪਾਹੁਣਾ ਜਿਉ ਆਇਆ ਤਿਉ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sunye ghar kaa paahunaa jiau aaeaa tiau jaae |
lines.english: Like guests in a deserted house, they leave just exactly as they have come.
